  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Representative",
  "description": "Sow Real Estate is a world-class luxury real estate super brand, with its core interest in the delivery of mass housing and luxury apartments. Sow is renowned for its sales, marketing and property management whilst emphasizing on the highest levels of excellence and Luxury. It is our mandate to systematically provide structure and infrastructure reflective of today&rsquo;s technological advancement to meet the basic needs of housing.
With perfection, detail and superior quality exhibited in all our projects, owning a Sow property is a certainly a living experience worth having.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative
Job Location: Asokoro, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a proactive and customer-focused Customer Service Executive to join our team.


Job Responsibilities


	Attend to customer inquiries via phone calls, emails, social media, and walk-ins.
	Provide accurate information about the company&#39;s products, services, and ongoing projects.
	Manage customer complaints and ensure timely resolution.
	Maintain positive relationships with clients and prospective customers.
	Follow up on leads and customer requests.
	Keep accurate records of customer interactions and transactions.
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure customer satisfaction.
	Prepare customer service reports as required.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc. Degree in any relevant discipline.
	At least 2 years of experience in customer service, front desk, or a related role.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong interpersonal and problem-solving abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.
	Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment.
	Experience in the real estate industry is an added advantage.


Salary
N150,000 Monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hrsowreal@gmail.com using &quot;Customer Service Representative &quot; as the subject of the email.",

Customer Service Representative Job at Sow Real Estate Limited




        
    

        
        Sow Real Estate is a world-class luxury real estate super brand, with its core interest in the delivery of mass housing and luxury apartments. Sow is renowned for its sales, marketing and property management whilst emphasizing on the highest levels of excellence and Luxury. It is our mandate to systematically provide structure and infrastructure reflective of today’s technological advancement to meet the basic needs of housing.
With perfection, detail and superior quality exhibited in all our projects, owning a Sow property is a certainly a living experience worth having.
     

            
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative
Job Location: Asokoro, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a proactive and customer-focused Customer Service Executive to join our team.


Job Responsibilities


	Attend to customer inquiries via phone calls, emails, social media, and walk-ins.
	Provide accurate information about the company's products, services, and ongoing projects.
	Manage customer complaints and ensure timely resolution.
	Maintain positive relationships with clients and prospective customers.
	Follow up on leads and customer requests.
	Keep accurate records of customer interactions and transactions.
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure customer satisfaction.
	Prepare customer service reports as required.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc. Degree in any relevant discipline.
	At least 2 years of experience in customer service, front desk, or a related role.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong interpersonal and problem-solving abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.
	Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment.
	Experience in the real estate industry is an added advantage.


Salary
N150,000 Monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Customer Service Representative " as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
